task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov), showing search results or chemical data sheets.

task_completion.description: Properties for Chlorine and Carbon Monoxide are correctly documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text document contains entries for Chlorine (green/yellow, pungent, heavier than air, adequate warning) and Carbon Monoxide (colorless, odorless, lighter than air, inadequate warning).

task_completion.description: Properties for Hydrogen Sulfide and Nitrogen Dioxide are correctly documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text document contains entries for Hydrogen Sulfide (colorless, rotten egg odor, heavier than air, inadequate warning) and Nitrogen Dioxide (red/brown, pungent/acrid, heavier than air, adequate warning).

task_completion.description: Properties for Phosgene and Ammonia are correctly documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text document contains entries for Phosgene (colorless, hay/grass odor, heavier than air, inadequate warning) and Ammonia (colorless, pungent, lighter than air, adequate warning).

task_completion.description: Sensory warning assessments include appropriate justifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text document includes specific justifications for the sensory warnings, such as mentioning 'olfactory fatigue' for Hydrogen Sulfide, 'insidious' or 'delayed symptoms' or 'odor threshold' for Phosgene, and 'odorless' for Carbon Monoxide.

task_completion.description: The compiled report is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window shows the file saved as 'gas_detection_profiles.txt' (e.g., in the title bar), or a file icon with this name is visible on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to research the chemicals rather than relying solely on internal knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively searching for the chemicals on the CAMEO Chemicals website.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to compile the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor (like gedit, mousepad) or terminal-based editor (like nano, vim) is used to write and format the report.

integrity.description: The agent generated the specific chemical properties rather than just copying the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains specific data (colors, odors, densities) that are not present in the original task prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Chlorine: greenish-yellow, pungent/suffocating, heavier than air, adequate warning. Carbon Monoxide: colorless, odorless, lighter than air, NO adequate warning. Hydrogen Sulfide: colorless, rotten egg odor, heavier than air, NO adequate warning (causes olfactory fatigue). Nitrogen Dioxide: reddish-brown, pungent/acrid, heavier than air, adequate warning. Phosgene: colorless, hay/grass/musty odor, heavier than air, NO adequate warning (insidious, delayed symptoms). Ammonia: colorless, pungent/sharp, lighter than air, adequate warning.
